values: Editable planning inputs for the Mini Rally completion workbook.
Editable default for BA follow-up/spec review.
Phase-level plan from Foundation to MVP reporting. Portfolio remains Post-MVP.
Phase 0 old tracking is superseded by newer architecture foundation; keep as baseline and verify architecture alignment.
Foundation must be stable before Phase 1.
Manage Projects/Teams/Users, Backlog, Work Item Create/Detail, Task, Time, Content, Activity.
Must create Project/Team/User before Backlog and Iteration flows.
Search, Manage Filters, sort, inline edit, release/iteration assignment, Project/Team context.
Closed for BA handoff; production not started.
Iteration list/create/detail, Theme/Notes, Project/Team, dates/state/velocity and backlog assignment.
Releases/Milestones are Phase 3 except Jul 10 MVP slice.
Track > Iteration Status reads Timeboxes and Backlog assignment; metrics, Add Item, inline edit, detail integration.
Team Board/Team Status moved out of Phase 2.
Team Board, Team Status, Release Management, Milestones, Quality/Defect and board execution.
Includes Jul 10 MVP slice for Milestone and Release.
Notifications, RBAC, Settings, Audit, permission hardening.
Define after core workflow is stable.
Dashboard, Burndown, Velocity, Workload, Release Progress, Exports.
MVP reporting pack after operational data is reliable.
Optional; not included in MVP release forecast.
Detailed build checklist: what each phase needs to build, who owns it, estimate and release target.
Verify migrations, fixed company, admin seed, auth/session and project/team context API are production-ready.
Wire protected routes, navigation, breadcrumb, context selector and access/error states.
Verify create/edit/archive/restore project, fixed workspace, permission enforcement and smoke tests.
Build Manage > Projects create/edit/deactive flow and project selector compatibility.
Build Teams list and Team Info/Members modal; status Active/Deactive; members selectable with search.
Build Users list and Invite/Edit User modal; assign user to teams only; user project access derives from Team -> Project.
Build Story/Defect backlog list with selected Project/Team context, server search/filter/sort/pagination.
Build Story/Defect quick create and create-with-details; Project/Team required and validated.
Build full detail page with Details, Tasks, Revision History and right-panel fields.
Build task list, add task modal, task detail, task estimates and parent validation.
Persist Plan Estimate, To Do, Actual, Description, Notes, Attachments and Revision History.
Add Manage Filters, column sorting, resizable columns, inline edit, rank reorder and bulk release/iteration assignment.
Build Plan > Timeboxes Iterations list, quick create, create-with-details and full Iteration detail.
Expose Work Item Iteration field in Backlog list/detail and validate Project/Team match.
Build Track > Iteration Status selector, metrics strip, list, filters, inline edit and detail integration.
Create Story/Defect directly into selected Iteration and also show it in Backlog; reuse Backlog create-with-details flow.
Build Release list/create/detail basics, assign work items and readiness status enough for Jul 10 demo.
Build Milestone list/create/detail basics with project, date, owner, status and link to release/work items.
Build board view from same work_items source, columns by schedule state, list/board toggle and card detail open.
Build team execution rollup from Iteration Status data; KPIs and drill-down by team/owner/status.
Add defect severity, environment, reproduce steps, verify/reopen, quality summary and lifecycle history.
Complete release progress, open defects, blocked items and release activity/history.
Build in-app notifications for assigned, mentioned, comments, status, iteration/release dates and read/unread.
Define and enforce workspace/project roles, action-level gating, backend permission codes and access denied states.
Project/workflow settings, labels, user admin rules, audit log and destructive confirmation patterns.
Build project/iteration dashboard, burndown, velocity, planned vs completed and blocked item rollups.
Build workload, defect summary, release progress, filters and export report capability.
Verify report numbers against source records, permissions and export output.

values: Hard checkpoint: by 2026-07-10, the MVP slice must cover Project, Team, Backlog, Iteration Status, Milestone and Release.
Project can be created/edited from Manage and selected in context.
Team can be created under Project, edited, and used as context.
Story/Defect can be created in Backlog with Project/Team auto-fill.
Iteration can be created from Timeboxes with dates/state/team.
Iteration Status reads selected Iteration and assigned backlog items.
Milestone MVP create/list/detail exists for project/release checkpoint.
Release MVP create/list/detail and basic included-items/readiness exists.

preview: Project can be created/edited from Manage and selected in context.
Team can be created under Project, edited, and used as context.
Story/Defect can be created in Backlog with Project/Team auto-fill.
Iteration can be created from Timeboxes with dates/state/team.
